channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Forschungsgruppe Wahlen for ZDF, 5–7 May 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
49 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Forschungsgruppe Wahlen for ZDF, 5–7 May 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/german_ep_polls/2026-05-07-ForschungsgruppeWahlen.html
